pages.raw_text:
Although drawing for the Occur
d'Alene reservation will continue
at Occur d'Alene today until 5000
names are drawn, the interest in
this reservation is ended. Yester-
: days drawing Of 1900 names, pub
AAhed today in full, covers all who
have any chance at the 1850 claims
to be had, and leaves margin for
those winners who may not take
advantage Of their rights.


The next drawing, for the Flat
head, will be held Thursday and
Friday. and that for the Spokane
reservation next Monday.


T0day's list begins with the sew
enth edition of yesterday. the sixth
edition having carried names not
here included to route and mail
subscribers.
